---
title: "IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School Day 2: Question Answering (Pavan Kapanipathi)"
description: "AMR → triples → entity/relation linking → logic → LNN reasoner. SOTA on OALD and LC-QuAD."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-12"
categories: [NLP, NLU, knowledge graphs, conference, paper]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School 2022. Image from [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](03.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](04.jpg)
:::
IBM NeuroSymbolicAI Summer School 2022 Day 2: Neuro-symbolic Approaches for QuestionAnswering given by Pavan Kapanipathi:

* Query -> AMR parse -> Triples -> Entity Linking -> Relation Linking -> Logic -> Reasoner
* Reasoner: LNN (Logical Neural Networks)
* SOTA on OALD and LC-OuAD

Pavan Kapanipathi, Ibrahim Abdelaziz, Srinivas Ravishankar, Salim Roukos, Alexander Gray, Ramón Fernández Astudillo, Maria Chang, et al. 2021. "Leveraging ABstract MEaning REpresentation for Knowledge Base Question Answering." In Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL-IJCNLP 2021, 3884–94. Online: Association for Computational Linguistics. <https://aclanthology.org/2021.findings-acl.339/>

Summer School site: <https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ibm-neurosymbolicai-questionanswering-activity-6963941686100062208-jhDp).*
